name: Tuna Mounds w Curry Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in butter until golden.
2. Drain tuna.
3. Mix onion, tuna, milk, bread crumbs, eggs, poultry seasoning, parsley, salt and nutmeg.
4. Shape into 6 mounds in a large shallow baking dish.
5. Mix 1/2 cup milk, soup, curry powder, and paprika.
6. Pour around tuna.
7. Top each tuna mound with a slice of olive.
8. Bake uncovered at 350° for about 45 minutes.
This can be made with salmon by using 1 1lb can of salmon and enough milk to make 1/2 cup when added to the drained salmon liquid.
